headline: 2 Big Agriculture Operations Stocks to Buy Despite Recent Headwinds
summary: ADM and CTVA stand out as top agriculture picks, leveraging innovation, pricing strength and product demand to navigate industry headwinds.

headline: Barclays Keeps an Equal Weight Rating on Archer-Daniels-Midland Company (ADM)
summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company (NYSE:ADM) is one of the 11 Biggest Agriculture Stocks to Buy in 2026. On April 1, 2026, Barclays analyst Benjamin Theuer increased Archer-Daniels-Midland Company (NYSE:ADM)’s price objective from $68 to $77 while maintaining an Equal Weight rating. Barclays linked the upgrade to anticipated oilseed market tightening following the EPA’s finalization of the Set […]
